ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicle_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle model */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles represented in this entry */,
  "km" INTEGER /* Average kilometers driven by the vehicles */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistical data */,
  "powerPS" INTEGER /* Power output of vehicles in PS (Pferdestärke) */,
  "minPrice" REAL /* Minimum price of the vehicles */,
  "maxPrice" REAL /* Maximum price of the vehicles */,
  "avgPrice" REAL /* Average price of the vehicles */,
  "sdPrice" REAL /* Standard deviation of prices */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the vehicle */,
  "emissions" REAL /* CO2 emissions of the vehicle */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the statistical data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_statistics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "year_introduced" INTEGER /* The year the vehicle model was introduced */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the model */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission for the model */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the model */,
  "emissions" REAL /* Average CO2 emissions for the model */,
  "horsepower_range" TEXT /* Range of horsepower for the model */,
  "mileage_range" TEXT /* Range of average kilometers driven for the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle model */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded price */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle model in the given year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle at the time of pricing */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the price data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the price record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id")
)
